mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.mobile FROM btg_user u WHERE u.referrer_user_id = #{referrerUserId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY u.id ASC
SELECT u.id, u.mobile FROM btg_user u WHERE u.ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%') AND u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY u.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM btg_user WHERE ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT(#{pathPrefix}, '%') AND deleted_at IS NULL
